title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW) - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW)
Date and Time: Thursday June 27, 2024,    3:00-5:15 pm EST Place: Zoom Chair: Lorraine Greaves (Chair), Louise    Pilote (Vice-chair) Secretariat: Centre for Policy, Pediatrics and International    Collaboration ( CPPIC ) Participants: SAC-HPW core members, Health Canada employees
3:00-3:10 Welcome and  Opening Remarks Sophie  Sommerer, Director General, Biologic and Radiopharmaceutical Drugs Directorate  ( BRDD ), Health Products and Food Branch ( HPFB )
3:10-3:20 Chair’s Address, Introduction of Members,  Review of Affiliations and Interests (A&I), Review of Agenda Dr. Lorraine Greaves, SAC-HPW Chair
3:20-3:35 Session  #1: Update on Breast Implants and Government Response Bruce  Randall, Director General, Medical Devices Directorate ( MDD )
3:35-3:50 Session #2: C ommittee Questions , Feedback and Recommendations SAC-HPW members
3:50-4:00 Session  #3: Clinical Trials Modernization Brian Parker, Associate  Director, Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs ( BPSIP ), Pharmaceutical  Drugs Directorate ( PDD )
Objective : To provide an overview of the proposed clinical trials  modernization initiative. This will set-up the discussion for the remainder of  the meeting on the proposed sex and gender based analysis ( SGBA ) plus component  of the clinical trials modernization initiative.
4:00-4:10 Session  #4: C ommittee  Questions ,  Feedback and Recommendations SAC-HPW members
4:10-4:20 Session  #5: Integrating SGBA Plus-Related Components in the Clinical Trials  Modernization Initiative Tanya Pires, Regulatory  Policy and Risk Management Specialist, CPPIC , BRDD
Objective : Discuss and  seek feedback from SAC-HPW with re to SGBA Plus CT Guidance.
4:20–4:50 Session  #6: C ommittee  Questions, Feedback and Recommendations SAC-HPW members
4:50-5:00 Review of SAC-HPW Recommendations Alysha Croker, Director, CPPIC
5:00-5:10 Secretariat  Update SAC-HPW Secretariat
Objective :  Inform members of relevant operational updates and timelines (e.g., meeting Record  of Proceedings (RoP); date/theme of upcoming meetings; future planning for  committee, including revision of the Terms of Reference and membership).
5:10-5:15 Closing and Adjournment of Meeting Chair
5:15 In-Camera  Session SAC-HPW members  only
